sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n49131" key="qrh/skeusis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θρήσκ-ευσις</orth> <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>,= foreg., <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phint.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stob.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.23.61a</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.).</entryFree>
